title: Partner integration failures after credential refresh
incident_summary: Inbound partner callbacks are rejected with signature mismatches across multiple clients.

alerts.title: Webhook signature mismatch
alerts.content: Signature verification failures increased to 31% on ingress gateway.

alerts.title: Gateway CPU warning
alerts.content: Gateway CPU at 68%, below autoscaling threshold.

logs.title: Secret version mismatch
logs.content: gateway using secret version v18 while signer moved to v19.

logs.title: TLS handshake retries
logs.content: Minor TLS retries from one partner ASN; no sustained failures.

runbook_snippets.title: Secret reload runbook
runbook_snippets.content: Trigger gateway config reload after secret rotation and verify signature checks.

runbook_snippets.title: Partner IP whitelist updates
runbook_snippets.content: Whitelist changes do not fix signature mismatch incidents.

timeline_notes.title: Secret rotated
timeline_notes.content: Secret manager rotation completed without triggering downstream reload hook.

red_herrings: A partner changed source IP ranges earlier in the day.
true_root_cause: Secret rotated but gateway did not reload new version
true_root_cause_aliases: missing config reload after secret rotation
true_mitigation: Reload gateway config and propagate new webhook secret
true_mitigation_aliases: trigger secret reload on ingress gateway
push rotated secret to webhook verifier
